name: generate_supply_chain_risk_report
description: Assess and summarize supply-chain risks for a selected vendor including CVE exposure and dependency trees.

parameters.name: orchestrate_disaster_recovery_test
parameters.description: Plan and coordinate a disaster recovery (DR) failover test for a region or service. Authorization required.

parameters.name: generate_compliance_pack
parameters.description: Create a compliance artifact pack (evidence checklist, policy templates) for a regulation (e.g., SOC2, ISO27001).
